'''Julianne Buescher''' is an American actor, Muppet performer and writer who performs in film, television, radio, and on stage. As a voice actor, she is known for many roles. She is also a Muppet performer for [[Wikipedia:The Jim Henson Company|The Jim Henson Company]], having worked for both ''[[Sesame Street]]'' and ''[[The Muppet Show|The Muppets]]''.<ref>{{Blogspot|subdomain=muppetnewsflash1|url=2007/03/julianne-buescher.html|name=The Muppet Newsflash|text=Articles: An Interview with Julianne Buescher|date=2007-03}}</ref>

For [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] and ''[[Star Wars]]'', Buescher provided voice work for various projects. Her earliest ''Star Wars'' work included [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s, notably [[Aeron Azzameen]] in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''<ref name="X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref> and [[Rianna Saren]] in ''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''.{{Fact}}<!-- Actor credited, but character name unidentified --> Later, as Disney opened [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge]], she lent her voice to characters at [[Black Spire Outpost]], including [[Koopla Nanuk]], Chuta, Weru, and Mom.<ref name="Galaxy's Edge Roles">{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/ByJXMh4ghCi/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2019-05-31|quote=SOOOO excited to voice characters at Star Wars Galaxy’s Edge Village!!! I play Koopla Nunuk, Chuta, Weru, and Mom! Super grateful!!! ..... #starwarsgalaxysedge #galaxysedge #biggeststarwarsfan #lavoactor #voiceactor #voiceoveractor #voiceoverlife #starwarsactor #starwarsworld @disneyland @waltdisneyworld #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref> She was also the voice match for [[Daisy Ridley]] as [[Rey Skywalker|Rey]].<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/CaiIWnhP8DE/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2022-02-28|quote=💕Soooooo honored to be her voice match!!!💕 ..... 📸: StarWars/Disney #rey #starwars #starwarsactor #starwarsvoices #voactor #voactors #voiceactor #voiceactors #voicematch #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref>

Outside of her work, Buescher is a fan of ''Star Wars'', including the [[sequel trilogy]], having posted about [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''The Last Jedi'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''The Rise of Skywalker'']].<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/Bc0REelBrfj/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2017-12-17|quote=❤️❤️WOW... okay... that was a lot. Gotta see it again...🙂. .... #starwars #ilovestarwars #jediknights #PathofJules #yoda #doordonot #disneymuppets #juliannebuescher}}</ref><ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B35qCObA_NA/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2019-10-21|quote=Tickets purchased?...YES. Before Halloween??...YES! Is this better than any pumpkin spice ANYTHING EVER??? YES!!!!!!!!!!!!! ✨❤️✨ ..... #starwarsislife❤️ #everythingstarwars💫 #starwarsactor #starwarsgirlforever #starwarsvoactor #starwarsticketsbought  #yodaforever❤️ #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref><ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B6SDfHdjSrn/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2019-12-20|quote=Speechless. I’m... this movie... okay... it’s... just go. Just. Go!!! ✨✨🌟💛🌟✨✨ Awesome artwork by @kazoomori (exclusive postcard giveaway at Arclight) .... #starwarsislife❤️ #icanteventalkrightnow #starwarsiseverything #starwarsriseofskywalker💛 #arclightcinemashollywood #arclightstarwarspostcard #kazoomori #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref><ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B6XJwAYj4LY/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2019-12-21|quote=Yes. Yes. 1000% Yes. ..... #starwarsislife❤️ #42yearjourney #starwarsiseverything #ofcourseisawitagain #bestholidaygiftever❤️ #proudtobepartofthestarwarsfamily #pathofjules #juliannebuescher 📸 by disney/starwars}}</ref> She celebrates [[May 4]].<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/BxDA6Cwl-X9/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2019-05-04|quote=✨❤️✨ ..... #maythefourthbewithyou #starwarsday #starwarsislife #bestdayever❤️ #may4 #happystarwarsday #thefourthwillbewithyoualways  #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref> She also visited Galaxy's Edge with an annual pass at [[Disneyland]]<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B7IENGRDEjV/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2020-01-09|quote=Resolution #1... annual pass to the gym. And by gym I mean Disneyland!!! ..... #bestgymever😄 #disneylandworkout #chewbaccayoga #doordonot💚 #galaxysedgecrosstraining #pathofjules #juliannebuescher pic by NewYorkTimes}}</ref> riding [[Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance]]<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B7se_iTD5VV/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2020-01-24|quote=THIS!!!!!!!!!!! Rise of the Resistance!!!!!!!!!!! Worth every bit of everything to get on!!! ..... #riseoftheresistanceride #starwarsislife❤️ #worththeeverything #goingagainasap #batuubound #blackspireoutpost #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref><ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B79a0QXnrwR/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2020-01-30|quote=Such a great experience!!! ✨💫🌟💫✨... and every ride has been COMPLETELY different!!! ❤️❤️❤️ ..... #riseoftheresistanceride #batuuexplorer #galaxysedgebatuu #starwarsislife❤️ #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref> constructing her own [[lightsaber]],<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B8MlNiiDxu2/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2020-02-05|quote=Constructing my own lightsaber at Savi’s!!!✨🎉🥳🎉✨ ..... #myownlightsaber #savislightsaberworkshop #blackspireoutpostbatuu #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref> and [[Millennium Falcon: Smuggler's Run|''Millennium Falcon'': Smuggler's Run]].<ref>{{Instagram|username=juliannebuescher|url=p/B-Le0UZDX79/?hl=en|name=[[Julianne Buescher]]|date=2020-03-25|quote=One of the places I miss most. *sigh* ..... #missingthemilleniumfalcon #missingbatuu #missingblackspireoutpost #pathofjules #juliannebuescher}}</ref>
